---
name: Pattern
about: Suggest a new owned media pattern
title: "[Pattern]: "
labels: pattern
assignees: ""
---

## Stage

Produce / Package / Publish / Prove / Preserve

## Category

Example: titles, RSS descriptions, LinkedIn, hardware, vector memory

## What Is It?

Describe the pattern.

## Best For

Who or what is this pattern best for?

## Why Does It Work?

Explain the underlying reason.

## Example Patterns

List examples if relevant.

## Quality Bar

What does good look like?

## When Not To Use

What are the tradeoffs or bad-fit cases?

## Evidence

Internal data, external research, teardown, or practitioner observation.
